message:
feat(robot): add --robot-recipes flag for JSON recipe listing

Adds machine-readable recipe listing for AI agent automation, enabling
programmatic discovery and selection of session presets.

New Flag:
- --robot-recipes    Output all available recipes as JSON

Recipe Sources (in order of precedence):
1. Project: .ntm/recipes.toml
2. User: ~/.config/ntm/recipes.toml
3. Builtin: Embedded presets

JSON Output Structure:
{
  "generated_at": "2025-12-10T...",
  "count": N,
  "recipes": [
    {
      "name": "full-stack",
      "description": "Full stack development setup",
      "claude": 3,
      "codex": 2,
      "gemini": 1,
      ...
    }
  ]
}

Use Cases:
- AI orchestrators can discover available recipes before spawning
- Build recipe selection UIs from machine-readable data
- Validate recipe names in automation scripts

Implementation:
- robot.PrintRecipes() loads all recipes via recipe.Loader
- Includes source tracking (builtin, user, project)
- Consistent JSON output format with other robot commands

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
